scripts.build: esbuild assets/css/main.css --minify --outfile=assets/css/main.min.css && esbuild assets/css/lightmode.css --minify --outfile=assets/css/lightmode.min.css && esbuild assets/css/darkmode.css --minify --outfile=assets/css/darkmode.min.css && esbuild assets/css/menu.css --minify --outfile=assets/css/menu.min.css && esbuild assets/css/newsletter.css --minify --outfile=assets/css/newsletter.min.css && esbuild assets/css/pathfinders.css --minify --outfile=assets/css/pathfinders.min.css && esbuild assets/js/page-config.js --minify --outfile=assets/js/page-config.min.js && esbuild assets/js/main.js --minify --outfile=assets/js/main.min.js && esbuild assets/js/analytics.js --minify --outfile=assets/js/analytics.min.js && esbuild assets/js/consent.js --minify --outfile=assets/js/consent.min.js && esbuild assets/js/newsletter.js --minify --outfile=assets/js/newsletter.min.js && esbuild assets/js/youtube.js --minify --outfile=assets/js/youtube.min.js
scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:css
